title: Singularity
description: When an ominous cosmic event swallows the icy home of a small space critter, he must find refuge among a group of luminous creatures watched over by a mysterious celestial being.
subtitle: A painterly space adventure set in a universe before the beginning of our time.

title: Wing It!
description: An uptight engineer gets an unwelcome visit from a enthusiastic wannabe-pilot, causing both of them to be launched into the air inside an out-of-control space shuttle.
subtitle: Blender Studio’s 15th Open Movie is an entertaining and stylized cartoon, exploring the polarized relationship between a cat and a dog.The goals of the project are to push Blender in the production of 2D/3D animation and to explore NPR and stylized rendering workflows.

title: Charge
description: In an energy-scarce dystopia, an old destitute man breaks into a battery factory but soon finds himself confronted by a deadly security droid and no way out.
subtitle: Blender Studio’s 14th Open Movie is a high-visual-impact, action-packed 3-minutes-long animation inspired by the game cinematics and realtime demos formats.The goals of the project are to challenge Blender and the creative team to pursue realism and push Blender’s capabilities in the interactive PBR workflow.

title: Sprite Fright
description: When a group of rowdy teenagers trek into an isolated forest, they discover peaceful mushroom creatures that turn out to be an unexpected force of nature.
subtitle: Blender Studio’s 13th open movie is an 80’s-inspired horror comedy, set in Britain: When a group of rowdy teenagers trek into an isolated forest, they discover peaceful mushroom creatures that turn out to be an unexpected force of nature.

title: Coffee Run
description: Fueled by caffeine, a young woman runs through the bittersweet memories of her past relationship.
subtitle: Coffee Run was directed by Hjalti Hjalmarsson and produced by the team at Blender Studio. Fueled by caffeine, a young woman runs through the bittersweet memories of her past relationship.

title: Spring
description: Spring is the story of a shepherd girl and her dog, who face ancient spirits in order to continue the cycle of life.
subtitle: Spring is the story of a shepherd girl and her dog, who face ancient spirits in order to continue the cycle of life. This poetic and visually stunning short film was written and directed by Andy Goralczyk, inspired by his childhood in the mountains of Germany.

title: Hero
description: A Blender '2D' open movie project, directed by Daniel Martinez Lara.
subtitle: Hero is a showcase for the upcoming Grease Pencil in Blender 2.8. Grease Pencil means 2D animation tools within a full 3D pipeline. In Blender. In Open Source. Free for everyone.Hero is directed by Daniel Martinez Lara, and it is the 6th short film funded by the Blender Cloud.

title: The Daily Dweebs
description: A fun animation concept featuring an adorable dog going though an emotional rollercoaster.
subtitle: Originally created by Hjalti Hjalmarsson (who is directing and animating) and art directed by Andy Goralczyk, this 50 seconds short animation will tell the story of an adorable dog who goes through a rollercoaster of emotions.

title: Agent 327
description: Operation Barbershop is the first animation test for the Agent 327 project, released in 2017.
subtitle: Feature film proof of concept, based on the celebrated Dutch comic character Agent 327.

title: Caminandes: Llamigos
description: Experience the Patagonian winter, where Koro has to struggle and fight to get one berry. But this time, he is not alone!
subtitle: In this episode of the Caminandes cartoon series we learn to know our hero Koro even better! It's winter in Patagonia, food is getting scarce. Koro the Llama engages with Oti the pesky penguin in an epic fight over that last tasty berry.

title: Glass Half
description: Exploring cartoon animation and rendering in Blender 2.6x viewport - this 2015 short film looks fantastic even in 4K.
subtitle: Two amateur art critics meet in a gallery and argue passionately about the pieces they see, causing chaos for everyone else, until finally they find a piece on which they can agree...The project was directed and written by Beorn Leonard, designed by Sarah Laufer and realized by the whole crew at the Blender Institute.

title: Cosmos Laundromat: First Cycle
description: Aimed at becoming a feature film, the first episode of Cosmos Laundromat became the biggest Blender Institute production so far.
subtitle: Project Gooseberry is the code name for Blender Foundation's 5th Open Movie project, Cosmos Laundromat. Beginning with a 10-minute pilot, the ultimate goal is to produce the world's first feature-length open-production animated film.

title: Caminandes: Gran Dillama
description: "Gran Dillama", the second Caminandes episode with Koro the stubborn llama was made in 2013.
subtitle: Some llamas have no luck. Inspired by the good old Chuck Jones cartoons, this series of shorts follows the misadventures of one particularly persistent llama - Koro - as he hunts for the good life on the other side of the street. Or fence.

title: Tears of Steel
description: In 2012 this film pushed the limits for motion tracking, masking and realistic rendering in Blender.
subtitle: Tears of Steel is a live-action/CGI short film by producer Ton Roosendaal and director/writer Ian Hubert. It chronicles a meeting between two people, recreated from the past, in attempt to stop the present robot apocalypse.

title: Sintel
description: This fantasy short film from 2010 pushed the Blender 2.5 project forward.
subtitle: Sintel tells the story of a friendship between a girl named Sintel, a baby dragon and the desperate lengths she will go to when that friendship is taken from her.

title: Big Buck Bunny
description: With millions of views all around the world, this 2008 film has become an open source legend.
subtitle: Tired of being picked on by Frankie the squirrel and his band of puny forest creatures, JC the bunny finally decides to fight back.

title: Elephants Dream
description: Released in 2006, this is widely known as the first open movie ever. Elephants Dream has put Blender on the radar for many pros.
subtitle: Elephants Dream tells the story of Emo and Proog, two people with different visions of the surreal world in which they live. Viewers are taken on a journey through that world, full of strange mechanical birds, stunning technological vistas and machinery that seems to have a life of its own.
